description: Composition Navy blue jacket made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex, has a mock collar with a full zippered placket, brand patch on the left chest, two insert pockets on the sides, long raglan sleeves with ribbed, striped cuffs, and a ribbed, striped hem Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash gently Do not machine wash or use fabric softener Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo Progressive casual wear meets sporty style in this stylish jacket from adidas. This piece nails the minimalistic mood that is trending currently. Work this Sports/casual aesthetic with a plaid shirt and classic denims, reminiscent of the retro blue collar 'all American' style. Suede or casual shoes work best with this ensemble. For a more sporty vibe, style this jacket under a sport T-shirt, track pants and sport shoes. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
